parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

WITH issues AS (
  SELECT ca.id, ca.project_id, ca.collaborator_id, ca.role, ca.scope, ca.status, ca.deadline, ca.fee_eur,
         ca.invited_at, ca.accepted_at, ca.delivered_at,
         EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - ca.invited_at)::int AS days_since_invited,
         CASE WHEN ca.deadline IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM ca.deadline::timestamp - now())::int ELSE NULL END AS days_to_deadline,
         CASE
           WHEN ca.status = 'invited' AND ca.invited_at < now() - INTERVAL '5 days' THEN 'invitation_no_response_5d'
           WHEN ca.status = 'accepted' AND ca.deadline IS NOT NULL AND ca.deadline < now()::date THEN 'accepted_overdue'
           WHEN ca.status = 'in_progress' AND ca.deadline IS NOT NULL AND ca.deadline < now()::date THEN 'in_progress_overdue'
           WHEN ca.status = 'delivered' AND ca.delivered_at < now() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 'delivered_pending_review_7d'
           WHEN ca.status IN ('accepted','in_progress') AND ca.deadline IS NOT NULL AND ca.deadline BETWEEN now()::date AND (now() + INTERVAL '3 days')::date THEN 'deadline_soon_3d'
           ELSE NULL
         END AS issue_type,
         p.name AS project_name,
         c.name AS collab_name, c.email AS collab_email, c.specialty
  FROM collab_assignments ca
  JOIN projects p ON p.id = ca.project_id
  JOIN collaborators c ON c.id = ca.collaborator_id
  WHERE ca.status NOT IN ('approved','closed','cancelled','rejected','rejected_delivery')
)
SELECT json_agg(issues.* ORDER BY (CASE issue_type
  WHEN 'accepted_overdue' THEN 1 WHEN 'in_progress_overdue' THEN 2
  WHEN 'invitation_no_response_5d' THEN 3 WHEN 'delivered_pending_review_7d' THEN 4
  WHEN 'deadline_soon_3d' THEN 5 ELSE 9 END), days_since_invited DESC) AS rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE issue_type IS NOT NULL) AS issue_count
  FROM issues
  WHERE issue_type IS NOT NULL;
